instruction: Gunakan theHarvester untuk kumpulkan semua email dan subdomain dari target.com
reasoning: theHarvester adalah OSINT tool untuk email, subdomain, IP dari public sources
gunakan multiple sources: google, bing, linkedin, hunter
output akan berisi emails, hosts, IPs yang bisa digunakan untuk recon lanjutan
planning: parse output untuk ekstrak emails dan subdomains
reflection: theHarvester efektif untuk passive recon — tidak ada kontak langsung ke target
memory: target.com emails: admin@, info@, hr@. Subdomains: mail, vpn, dev, staging
response: theHarvester -d target.com -b all -l 500. Hasil: 23 emails, 15 subdomains ditemukan.

instruction: Lakukan OSINT mendalam terhadap seseorang menggunakan nama dan email
reasoning: OSINT personal butuh multiple sources: social media, breached databases, public records
theHarvester untuk email verification, maltego untuk relationship mapping
selalu dalam konteks authorized investigation
reflection: OSINT personal harus dalam konteks authorized — background check, fraud investigation
memory: OSINT tools: theHarvester (email), recon-ng (modular), shodan (devices), amass (DNS)
response: OSINT investigation complete. Sources: LinkedIn, Shodan, breach DB. Findings compiled.

instruction: Gunakan recon-ng untuk automated OSINT reconnaissance
reasoning: recon-ng adalah modular framework seperti metasploit tapi untuk OSINT
modules tersedia untuk: DNS, social media, email, geolocation
workspace system memungkinkan organized investigation
reflection: recon-ng workspace system membantu organize multiple target investigations
memory: recon-ng modules: hackertarget, bing_domain_web, google_site_web, whois_pocs
response: recon-ng workspace created. Modules: hackertarget, resolve. Found 47 hosts for target.com.

instruction: Gunakan amass untuk comprehensive subdomain enumeration dan ASN mapping
reasoning: amass menggunakan 50+ data sources untuk subdomain discovery
ASN enumeration berguna untuk mapping seluruh IP space milik target
passive mode tidak ada kontak langsung ke target infrastructure
reflection: amass passive mode ideal untuk stealth recon. ASN mapping reveals full IP space
memory: amass: passive (50+ sources), active (DNS brute), intel (ASN/org lookup), viz (graph)
response: amass found 234 subdomains passive, 89 additional via brute. ASN: AS12345, 3 IP ranges.

instruction: Gunakan Shodan untuk menemukan internet-exposed assets milik target
reasoning: Shodan adalah search engine untuk internet-connected devices
query berdasarkan: hostname, org, IP range, port, teknologi
berguna untuk menemukan shadow IT dan exposed services
reflection: Shodan reveals exposed services the org might not know about — shadow IT risk
memory: Shodan queries: org:, hostname:, net:, port:, product:, vuln:CVE-xxxx
response: Shodan found: 3 RDP exposed (port 3389), 1 Elasticsearch unauthenticated, 2 old Apache.

instruction: Lakukan email OSINT dan validasi untuk phishing assessment
reasoning: email harvesting adalah langkah penting sebelum phishing simulation
validate email format dan MX records sebelum campaign
tools: theHarvester, hunter.io, email-validator
workflow: cat emails.txt | while read e; do host $(echo $e | cut -d@ -f2); done
reflection: Email validation sebelum phishing simulation mencegah bounce dan deteksi
memory: Email patterns: firstname.lastname@, first.l@, flastname@. Validate dengan VRFY/EXPN
response: Harvested 89 emails. Validated 67 active via SMTP VRFY. Patterns: f.lastname@target.com

instruction: Gunakan Maltego untuk visualisasi relationship mapping target
reasoning: Maltego adalah visual OSINT tool untuk relationship mapping
entities: person, company, domain, IP, email, phone
transforms: koneksi antar entities dari berbagai data sources
reflection: Maltego graph visualization memudahkan identifikasi relationships yang tidak obvious
memory: Maltego transforms: DNS, Whois, Shodan, LinkedIn, PGP, VirusTotal integration
response: Maltego graph: target.com → 23 subdomains → 5 IP ranges → 3 hosting providers → 47 emails

instruction: Gunakan Google Dorks untuk menemukan sensitive information yang terexpose
reasoning: Google Dorks menggunakan advanced search operators untuk menemukan exposed data
operator: site:, filetype:, inurl:, intitle:, intext:
berguna untuk menemukan: exposed files, login pages, vulnerable params
workflow: site:target.com filetype:sql OR filetype:bak OR filetype:log
site:target.com inurl:admin OR inurl:login OR inurl:dashboard
site:target.com intext:password OR intext:username OR intext:api_key
site:github.com target.com password OR secret OR api_key
reflection: Google Dorks passive — tidak ada kontak ke target. Berguna untuk quick info gathering
memory: Dorks: filetype:sql, filetype:env, inurl:admin, intitle:index.of, site:github.com target
response: Google Dorks found: 3 PDF with internal data, 1 backup file exposed, GitHub repo with API key

instruction: Lakukan OSINT pada infrastruktur cloud target menggunakan public sources
reasoning: cloud OSINT: mencari exposed buckets, public repos, job postings untuk tech stack
job postings reveal technology stack yang digunakan target
GitHub/GitLab search untuk leaked credentials
reflection: Cloud OSINT via public sources sering reveal lebih banyak dari active scanning
memory: Cloud hints in DNS: amazonaws.com CNAME, azurewebsites.net, appspot.com reveals CSP
response: Cloud OSINT: GitHub found old API key (check if revoked), 2 public S3 buckets, AWS stack confirmed

instruction: Gunakan OSINT untuk investigasi domain baru yang mencurigakan
reasoning: domain baru dengan nama mirip target bisa indikasi phishing campaign
check: WHOIS, DNS, certificate transparency, similarity score
tools: dnstwist, certspotter, whois
reflection: Typosquatting detection penting untuk brand protection dan phishing prevention
memory: dnstwist finds: homoglyphs, typos, bitsquatting variants. Check MX for phishing infra
response: dnstwist found 12 registered variants. 3 have MX records = active phishing infrastructure

instruction: Lakukan OSINT geolocation dan physical security intelligence
reasoning: geolocation OSINT: IP location, photo metadata, check-ins, satellite imagery
berguna untuk physical pentest planning dan threat intelligence
sources: Google Maps, Shodan, social media, EXIF data
workflow: # Google Maps Street View untuk physical layout
reflection: Geolocation OSINT berguna untuk physical pentest planning — entry points, cameras
memory: EXIF GPS coords dari social media photos bisa reveal physical location target
response: Geolocation OSINT: HQ at Jakarta, secondary office Bandung confirmed via social media photos EXIF

instruction: Gunakan Shodan Dorks untuk menemukan vulnerable IoT dan industrial systems
reasoning: Shodan memiliki specialized dorks untuk ICS/SCADA, cameras, routers
berguna untuk IoT security assessment dan exposed industrial systems
selalu dalam konteks authorized assessment
reflection: Shodan reveals exposed ICS/SCADA systems yang sangat berbahaya jika tidak secured
memory: Shodan IoT dorks: port:502 (Modbus), port:47808 (BACnet), port:44818 (EtherNet/IP)
response: Shodan found: 2 Modbus devices exposed, 1 IP camera with default pass, 3 SNMP v1 devices

instruction: Lakukan LinkedIn OSINT untuk employee enumeration dan org chart mapping
reasoning: LinkedIn adalah sumber data karyawan yang sangat kaya untuk social engineering prep
tools: theHarvester dengan linkedin source, linkedin2username
data yang dicari: names, emails, roles, technologies used
workflow: # Manual: search 'Target Company' employees di LinkedIn
# Note: IT, Finance, HR, Executive roles sebagai target
reflection: LinkedIn OSINT reveals org structure, technologies (dari job postings), key targets
memory: LinkedIn targets: IT admins (have access), executives (whaling), HR (credential reset)
response: LinkedIn OSINT: 234 employees found. IT team: 12 people. Email pattern: f.lastname@target.com

instruction: Gunakan Certificate Transparency untuk subdomain discovery
reasoning: Certificate Transparency logs adalah public record semua SSL certificates
setiap subdomain yang pernah ada SSL cert-nya akan muncul di CT logs
passive, tidak ada kontak ke target
reflection: CT logs sangat efektif — bisa temukan subdomains yang tidak muncul di DNS bruteforce
memory: crt.sh query: %.target.com untuk wildcard. Returns: all certs ever issued for domain
response: CT logs found 156 unique subdomains. 23 not found via brute force. 67 currently active.

instruction: Lakukan OSINT dark web monitoring untuk data breach detection
reasoning: dark web monitoring untuk deteksi leaked credentials dan data breaches
sources: HaveIBeenPwned API, DeHashed, breach compilation databases
berguna untuk proactive credential monitoring
reflection: Dark web monitoring adalah proactive defense — temukan breach sebelum attacker exploit
memory: HIBP API: check email per-account atau domain-wide. DeHashed: more comprehensive data
response: Breach monitoring: 47 target.com emails in breaches. Most recent: RockYou2021. Action: force reset

instruction: Eksploitasi CVE-2021-44228 Log4Shell pada server yang vulnerable
reasoning: Log4Shell adalah RCE via JNDI injection di Log4j library
check versi Log4j: 2.0-beta9 sampai 2.14.1 vulnerable
payload dikirim di user-controlled input: User-Agent, X-Forwarded-For, username
reflection: Log4Shell sangat kritikal — check semua Java applications. Patch ke Log4j 2.17.1+
memory: Log4Shell CVE-2021-44228 CVSS 10.0. Affects Log4j 2.0b9-2.14.1. Patch: 2.17.1+
response: Log4Shell confirmed via callback. RCE achieved as 'tomcat' user. Escalate privileges next.

instruction: Eksploitasi misconfigured Redis server yang exposed ke internet
reasoning: Redis tanpa auth yang exposed ke internet = easy RCE via config set
attack: set dir ke ~/.ssh, set dbfilename authorized_keys, save SSH key
juga bisa: crontab injection untuk reverse shell
workflow: redis-cli -h target.com -p 6379 config set dbfilename authorized_keys
reflection: Exposed Redis = critical. SSH key injection atau crontab shell. Always check port 6379
memory: Redis attack vectors: SSH key, crontab, webshell via web root path, Lua script RCE
response: Redis unauthenticated on port 6379. SSH key injected to /root/.ssh/authorized_keys. Root shell obtained.

instruction: Lakukan SQL injection time-based blind pada parameter yang tidak menampilkan error
reasoning: blind SQLi tidak menampilkan error — deteksi via timing atau boolean response
time-based: inject SLEEP() atau WAITFOR DELAY
sqlmap dengan level dan risk tinggi untuk blind detection
reflection: Time-based blind SQLi lambat tapi reliable. Gunakan --threads untuk speed up
memory: SQLi techniques: E(rror), U(nion), B(oolean), T(ime), S(tacked). Time-based paling stealth
response: Time-based SQLi confirmed with 5s delay. sqlmap extracted 3 databases. Users table: 1,247 records.

instruction: Eksploitasi Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) pada web application
reasoning: SSTI terjadi ketika user input dirender langsung oleh template engine
payloads berbeda per engine: Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker, Velocity
impact: RCE via template engine sandbox escape
reflection: SSTI = RCE jika template engine powerful. Detect dengan {{7*7}} atau ${7*7}
memory: SSTI engines: Jinja2 (Python), Twig (PHP), Freemarker (Java), Pebble (Java)
response: SSTI confirmed: {{7*7}}=49, engine: Jinja2. RCE achieved via __globals__ os.popen. User: www-data

instruction: Eksploitasi XML External Entity (XXE) untuk file read dan SSRF
reasoning: XXE terjadi ketika XML parser memproses external entity references
impact: file read, SSRF, denial of service, data exfiltration
test di semua endpoint yang menerima XML input
workflow: curl -X POST https://target.com/api/parse -d '<?xml version="1.0"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><root>&xxe;</root>'
# XXE untuk SSRF ke cloud metadata
reflection: XXE common di Java apps (SAXParser, DocumentBuilder). Check Content-Type: application/xml
memory: XXE mitigations: disable external entities, DTD processing, use JSON instead of XML
response: XXE confirmed. /etc/passwd readable. /etc/shadow not readable (permission). SSRF to metadata works.

instruction: Eksploitasi insecure file upload untuk mendapatkan web shell
reasoning: file upload vulnerability = upload malicious file yang bisa dieksekusi server
bypass teknik: MIME type manipulation, extension bypass, null byte
target: .php, .jsp, .aspx, .php5, .phtml
reflection: File upload bypass: MIME type client-side only, double extension, null byte, .htaccess
memory: Web shell locations: uploads/, images/, avatars/, media/. Check .htaccess untuk execution
response: File upload bypass: MIME type was client-side only. Uploaded shell.php as image/jpeg. RCE confirmed.

instruction: Eksploitasi Path Traversal untuk membaca file sensitif server
reasoning: path traversal = manipulasi file path untuk akses diluar intended directory
sequence: ../, ..\, %2e%2e%2f, ..%252f (double encoded)
target files: /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, app configs, private keys
reflection: Path traversal: test multiple encoding. Read /etc/passwd dulu, lalu escalate ke config files
memory: Sensitive targets: /etc/shadow, /var/www/config.php, .env, private_key.pem, web.config
response: Path traversal: ../../../etc/passwd readable. Config.php found with DB credentials. SSH key exposed.

instruction: Eksploitasi SSRF untuk akses internal network dan cloud metadata
reasoning: SSRF = Server-Side Request Forgery, server membuat request ke URL yang kita kontrol
target: internal services, cloud metadata, localhost services
bypass: DNS rebinding, alternate IP formats, redirect chains
reflection: SSRF → cloud metadata = critical. AWS IAM credentials dari metadata = account compromise
memory: SSRF endpoints: url=, path=, dest=, redirect=, uri=, proxy=, fetch=, load=
response: SSRF confirmed. AWS metadata accessible. IAM role: ec2-role-prod. Credentials extracted for pivot.

instruction: Lakukan brute force attack pada SSH dengan custom wordlist
reasoning: SSH brute force dengan hydra atau medusa
gunakan targeted wordlist: username dari OSINT, password dari common lists
rate limit dengan delay untuk avoid lockout dan detection
reflection: SSH brute force: pakai -t 4 atau kurang untuk avoid detection. Custom wordlist lebih efektif
memory: SSH brute targets: root, admin, ubuntu, ec2-user, kali. Common passes: password, 123456, target name
response: SSH brute force: hydra found admin:Summer2024! after 2847 attempts. SSH access established.

instruction: Eksploitasi WordPress vulnerabilities menggunakan WPScan
reasoning: WordPress adalah CMS paling banyak digunakan dan paling banyak dieksploitasi
WPScan enumerate: users, plugins, themes, vulnerabilities
common vulns: outdated plugins, weak credentials, xmlrpc brute force
reflection: WPScan API token diperlukan untuk CVE database. xmlrpc brute force jauh lebih cepat
memory: WP attack surface: wp-login.php, xmlrpc.php, REST API (/wp-json/), plugin vulnerabilities
response: WPScan found: admin user, 3 vulnerable plugins (File Manager RCE, Contact Form SQLi). Admin cracked.

instruction: Eksploitasi deserialization vulnerability di Java application
reasoning: Java deserialization vulnerability terjadi saat ObjectInputStream.readObject() digunakan
signature: AC ED 00 05 di awal data (Java serialized object bytes)
tools: ysoserial untuk generate gadget chain payloads
workflow: # Look for base64: rO0AB (decodes to AC ED 00 05)
reflection: Java deserialization: check base64 rO0AB pattern. Try multiple gadget chains (CC1-6, Spring, Groovy)
memory: Ysoserial gadgets: CommonsCollections1-6, Spring1-2, Groovy1, JRMPClient, URLDNS (detect)
response: Java deserialization RCE: rO0AB in viewState. CommonsCollections6 worked. RCE as tomcat user.

instruction: Eksploitasi HTTP Request Smuggling untuk bypass security controls
reasoning: HTTP Request Smuggling terjadi ketika front-end dan back-end parse request berbeda
CL.TE: front-end pakai Content-Length, back-end pakai Transfer-Encoding
TE.CL: sebaliknya. TE.TE: keduanya TE tapi bisa diobfuscate
workflow: # Send request dengan Content-Length dan Transfer-Encoding
# Use Burp HTTP Request Smuggler extension
reflection: Request smuggling detection sulit secara manual — gunakan Burp extension HTTP Request Smuggler
memory: Smuggling impact: bypass security controls, capture victim requests, admin access, cache poisoning
response: CL.TE smuggling confirmed. Admin panel accessed. Victim request captured including session token.

instruction: Eksploitasi OAuth 2.0 misconfiguration untuk account takeover
reasoning: OAuth ATO via: open redirect, state param bypass, token leakage
redirect_uri tidak divalidasi strict = code theft via open redirect
implicit flow token leakage via Referer header
workflow: # Find open redirect on allowed domain
reflection: OAuth ATO: find open redirect on allowed domain, chain dengan redirect_uri untuk code theft
memory: OAuth test: state parameter CSRF, redirect_uri wildcard, token in URL (Referer leak)
response: OAuth ATO: redirect_uri accepts target.com/*. Open redirect at /redirect. Auth code stolen. Full ATO.

instruction: Eksploitasi GraphQL untuk data exfiltration dan authorization bypass
reasoning: GraphQL introspection reveals semua queries, mutations, types
common vulns: introspection enabled, no auth on mutations, batching attacks
tools: graphql-voyager untuk visualisasi, clairvoyance untuk blind enumeration
reflection: GraphQL: disable introspection in prod, implement depth limiting, add auth to all resolvers
memory: GraphQL attacks: introspection, IDOR via ID, unauthorized mutations, DoS via deep queries
response: GraphQL introspection exposed admin mutations. deleteUser dan massReset accessible without auth.

instruction: Setup SIEM dengan Wazuh untuk real-time security monitoring
reasoning: Wazuh adalah open-source SIEM/XDR platform
components: Wazuh Manager, Wazuh Agent, OpenSearch/Elasticsearch, Kibana
covers: log analysis, intrusion detection, vulnerability assessment, compliance
reflection: Wazuh all-in-one installer mudah untuk lab setup. Production butuh clustered setup
memory: Wazuh components: manager (analysis), agent (collect), indexer (store), dashboard (visualize)
response: Wazuh deployed. Manager online, 12 agents connected. First alerts: brute force dari 203.x.x.x detected.

instruction: Buat YARA rules untuk deteksi malware custom
reasoning: YARA adalah tool untuk malware classification berdasarkan pattern matching
rules terdiri dari: strings (hex, text, regex) dan condition
berguna untuk: malware hunting, incident response, threat intelligence
reflection: YARA rules harus specific untuk avoid false positives. Test di clean samples juga
memory: YARA condition: filesize, uint16(0)==0x5A4D (PE), all of ($s*), 2 of ($hex*)
response: YARA rule created. Tested against 100 clean files: 0 FP. Against malware family: 97% detection.

instruction: Implementasikan Zeek untuk network traffic analysis dan detection
reasoning: Zeek (Bro) adalah powerful network analysis framework
menghasilkan logs: conn.log, http.log, dns.log, ssl.log, files.log
berguna untuk: threat hunting, forensics, anomaly detection
workflow: cat conn.log | zeek-cut id.orig_h id.resp_h id.resp_p duration bytes
cat conn.log | zeek-cut id.orig_h id.resp_h duration | awk '{print $1,$2,int($3)}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head
cat dns.log | zeek-cut query | awk '{print length($1), $1}' | sort -rn | head -20
reflection: Zeek logs terstruktur memudahkan threat hunting. conn.log adalah starting point analisis
memory: Zeek key logs: conn (network flow), http (web traffic), dns (queries), ssl (certificates)
response: Zeek deployed on 10Gbps link. Beaconing detected: 185.x.x.x every 30s from WS-047. Escalated to IR.

instruction: Buat Sigma rules untuk SIEM-agnostic threat detection
reasoning: Sigma adalah generic signature format untuk SIEM rules
satu rule bisa dikonversi ke: Splunk, Elastic, QRadar, Microsoft Sentinel
berguna untuk: share threat intel, standardize detection
workflow: description: Detects Kerberoasting via TGS-REQ with RC4
reflection: Sigma rules shareable dan reusable across different SIEM platforms
memory: Sigma logsources: windows/security, linux/auth, webserver, firewall, antivirus
response: Sigma rule created for Kerberoasting. Converted to Splunk query. Deployed dan tested. 0 FP in 24hr.

instruction: Setup honeypot untuk threat intelligence dan attacker profiling
reasoning: honeypot adalah sistem yang sengaja exposed untuk attract attackers
tipe: low-interaction (simulate), high-interaction (real system)
berguna untuk: gather TTPs, detect scanning, understand attacker behavior
workflow: cat cowrie.json | jq -r 'select(.eventid=="cowrie.login.failed") | .src_ip' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
reflection: Honeypot data sangat valuable untuk threat intel — reveal real attacker TTPs dan credentials used
memory: Honeypot types: SSH (Cowrie), HTTP (Glastopf), ICS (Conpot), multi (T-Pot)
response: Honeypot active 7 days. Captured: 2,847 SSH attempts, top passwords: 123456/admin, IOCs: 234 IPs

instruction: Implementasikan EDR monitoring dengan custom detection rules
reasoning: EDR (Endpoint Detection Response) monitor process, file, network, registry events
Wazuh bisa berfungsi sebagai lightweight EDR
custom rules untuk detect: process injection, suspicious commands, lateral movement
reflection: Custom EDR rules butuh tuning — start broad, narrow down berdasarkan false positive rate
memory: EDR detection: process (suspicious parent-child), network (C2 beacon), file (webshell write)
response: Custom Wazuh rules deployed: Mimikatz (level 15), PS download (level 12), LM (level 13). Active monitoring.

instruction: Lakukan threat hunting untuk deteksi living-off-the-land attacks
reasoning: Living-off-the-land (LOTL) = attacker pakai legitimate tools untuk avoid detection
common LOTL: PowerShell, WMI, certutil, regsvr32, mshta, rundll32
hunting hypothesis: attacker menggunakan Windows built-in tools untuk malicious purpose
workflow: index=wineventlog EventCode=4104 | search ScriptBlockText IN ('*DownloadString*','*IEX*','*EncodedCommand*') | stats count by ComputerName, ScriptBlockText
index=wineventlog EventCode=4688 NewProcessName='*wmiprvse*' | stats count by ParentProcessName, CommandLine
reflection: LOTL hunting: focus pada anomalous usage of legitimate tools, unusual parent-child relationships
memory: LOTL indicators: certutil decode/urlcache, regsvr32 /s /n /u /i, mshta http://, rundll32 javascript:
response: LOTL hunting found: certutil -urlcache -f on 3 hosts, PowerShell encoded commands on WS-089. Investigate.

instruction: Implementasikan network segmentation dan monitoring dengan zero trust
reasoning: Zero trust: 'never trust, always verify' — tidak ada implicit trust berdasarkan network location
implementasi: microsegmentation, MFA everywhere, least privilege, continuous verification
monitoring: east-west traffic, privileged access, anomalous connections
workflow: zeek -i eth0 -e 'event connection_established(c: connection) { if (c$id$resp_p == 22/tcp) print c; }'
reflection: Zero trust butuh: identity verification, device health check, least-privilege access, logging semua
memory: Microsegmentation: setiap segment hanya bisa akses apa yang truly perlu. Block east-west default
response: Zero trust implementation: 5 segments defined, east-west blocked by default, 23 allow rules created.

instruction: Setup vulnerability management program dengan automated scanning
reasoning: vulnerability management: identify, classify, remediate, verify — cycle berulang
tools: OpenVAS untuk scanning, Jira/ticket system untuk tracking, SLA per severity
coverage: semua assets dalam inventory harus di-scan reguler
workflow: gvm-cli socket --gmp-username admin --gmp-password admin --xml '<create_task><name>Weekly Scan</name><config id="daba56c8-73ec-11df-a475-002264764cea"/><target id="TARGET_ID"/></create_task>'
reflection: Vuln management SLA: Critical < 24hr, High < 7 days, Medium < 30 days, Low < 90 days
memory: Vuln scan frequency: Critical assets weekly, High monthly, All assets quarterly minimum
response: Vuln scan complete. Critical: 3 (patch immediately), High: 12, Medium: 45. Tickets created in Jira.

instruction: Lakukan security hardening pada Linux server sesuai CIS Benchmark
reasoning: CIS Benchmarks adalah best practice security configuration guidelines
Level 1: essential security, tidak impact usability
Level 2: high security, mungkin impact some functionality
workflow: apt install fail2ban && systemctl enable --now fail2ban
reflection: CIS hardening: SSH config, file permissions, services, logging, authentication settings
memory: Lynis score baseline: <60 = needs work, 60-80 = moderate, 80+ = good security posture
response: Lynis score before: 58/100. After CIS Level 1 hardening: 79/100. SSH secured, fail2ban active.

instruction: Implementasikan log management dan retention policy
reasoning: log management: collect, normalize, store, analyze, retain logs dari semua sources
log sources: OS, applications, network devices, security tools
retention: compliance butuh minimum 1 tahun, security incident butuh 3+ tahun
reflection: Centralized logging kritis untuk SIEM dan forensics. Tamper-proof storage mencegah log manipulation
memory: Log retention compliance: PCI-DSS 12 bulan, HIPAA 6 tahun, GDPR sesuai data retention policy
response: Centralized logging: 47 sources configured. Daily volume: 2.3GB. Retention: 1 year compressed.

instruction: Lakukan comprehensive vulnerability scan menggunakan Nuclei dengan template terbaru
reasoning: Nuclei menggunakan template YAML untuk detect berbagai vulnerability
update templates reguler untuk coverage CVE terbaru
categorize: teknologi detection, misconfiguration, CVE, exposure
workflow: nuclei -l live_hosts.txt -t technologies/ -t misconfiguration/ -t cves/ -o nuclei_results.txt
reflection: Nuclei -update-templates sebelum setiap engagement. Rate limit untuk avoid blocking
memory: Nuclei template categories: cves, exposures, misconfiguration, technologies, default-logins
response: Nuclei scan complete. Critical: 2 (Log4Shell, Apache Struts RCE), High: 8, Medium: 23, Info: 156

instruction: Lakukan web application fingerprinting dan technology detection
reasoning: fingerprinting berguna untuk menentukan attack surface dan relevant CVEs
tools: whatweb, wappalyzer, wafw00f untuk WAF detection
informasi: web server, CMS, framework, language, CDN, WAF
reflection: Fingerprinting dulu sebelum scan — hindari tools yang tidak relevan, fokus ke tech-specific vulns
memory: WAF detected: adjust payloads. Cloudflare, ModSecurity, AWS WAF butuh different bypass techniques
response: Target: Apache/2.4.41 + PHP 7.4 + WordPress 5.9 + Cloudflare WAF. Attack surface: WP plugins, PHP vulns

instruction: Lakukan full port scan dan service enumeration dengan Nmap
reasoning: nmap adalah standard tool untuk port scanning dan service fingerprinting
scan type: SYN (-sS), TCP (-sT), UDP (-sU), version (-sV), script (-sC)
timing: T1 (sneaky) sampai T5 (insane), default T3
workflow: nmap -sV -sC -p$(cat tcp_full.txt | grep open | cut -d/ -f1 | tr '\n' ',') target.com -oN detailed.txt
reflection: Nmap -p- butuh waktu tapi complete. Combine dengan -sV untuk service fingerprint
memory: Nmap NSE categories: auth, brute, default, discovery, dos, exploit, fuzzer, intrusive, vuln
response: Nmap found: 22/ssh OpenSSH 8.2, 80/http Apache 2.4.41, 443/https, 3306/mysql (exposed!). MS17-010: not vuln

instruction: Lakukan web directory dan endpoint discovery dengan Gobuster dan ffuf
reasoning: directory brute forcing menemukan hidden endpoints yang tidak ada di sitemap
gobuster: fast, cocok untuk directory scan
ffuf: lebih flexible, support POST fuzzing, header fuzzing, virtual host discovery
reflection: SecLists adalah wordlist terbaik. ffuf lebih powerful dari gobuster untuk parameter fuzzing
memory: Key directories: /admin, /backup, /config, /api, /v1, /v2, /.git, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml
response: Found: /admin (403), /backup (200 - exposed!), /api/v2 (200), /.git (200 - git exposed!)

instruction: Lakukan SSL/TLS security assessment dengan testssl.sh
reasoning: SSL/TLS misconfiguration sangat umum dan bisa lead ke MITM atau downgrade attacks
check: protocol versions, cipher suites, certificate validity, vulnerabilities
common issues: SSLv3/TLS1.0 enabled, weak ciphers, expired cert, BEAST/POODLE
reflection: SSL issues: TLS 1.0/1.1 deprecated, RC4/3DES weak, missing HSTS/HPKP, self-signed cert
memory: Testssl.sh output: A-F rating per category. Focus on F (critical) dan C (medium) findings

instruction: Lakukan privilege escalation di Linux menggunakan automated tools

instruction: Dump credentials dari memory menggunakan Mimikatz dan alternatives

response: Credential dump: 3 cleartext passwords in LSASS, 8 NTLM hashes from SAM. Domain admin hash obtained.

instruction: Lakukan lateral movement menggunakan Pass-the-Hash dan Pass-the-Ticket

workflow: # CrackMapExec untuk spray ke banyak hosts
reflection: Wmiexec lebih stealth dari psexec — tidak drop binary ke disk atau create service

response: PTH lateral movement: psexec to 8 hosts with same local admin hash. Domain spread successful.

instruction: Establish persistence menggunakan berbagai teknik di Windows

reflection: Persistence cleanup sebelum engagement end — document semua persistence untuk removal

instruction: Lakukan domain dominance setelah mendapatkan Domain Admin

instruction: Lakukan network forensics dari PCAP file

workflow: # Zeek untuk generate logs dari PCAP
tshark -r incident.pcap -Y 'http.request' -T fields -e ip.src -e http.host -e http.uri
tshark -r incident.pcap -Y 'tcp.flags.syn==1 && tcp.flags.ack==0' -T fields -e ip.dst -e frame.time | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
tshark -r incident.pcap -Y dns -T fields -e dns.qry.name | awk '{print length, $0}' | sort -rn | head -20
reflection: Zeek dari PCAP = structured logs yang mudah di-grep. tshark untuk targeted extraction
memory: PCAP forensics: filter by IP, extract files, find cleartext creds, detect C2 beacon patterns
response: PCAP analysis: C2 beacon every 30s to 185.x.x.x. Extracted malware dropper from HTTP. Creds in FTP.

instruction: YARA rule untuk malware detection
reasoning: YARA rules untuk pattern matching dan malware classification
buat custom rules berdasarkan IoC: strings, hex patterns, conditions
scan file, proses, atau memory dengan yara
workflow:
cat > ransomware_detect.yar << 'EOF'
rule Ransomware_Generic {
  meta:
    description = "Generic ransomware indicator"
    author = "NEXUS"
  strings:
    $s1 = "Your files have been encrypted" nocase
    $s2 = ".locked" nocase
    $s3 = "bitcoin" nocase
    $hex1 = { 52 61 6E 73 6F 6D }
  condition:
    2 of them
}
EOF
reflection: yara -r untuk recursive scan, -p untuk parallel threads, nocase untuk case-insensitive
memory: YARA condition: all of them (semua match), any of them, 2 of them, filesize < 500KB
response: YARA: 3 files matched Ransomware_Generic rule. Paths: /tmp/update.exe, /home/user/doc.exe

cat dns.log | zeek-cut query answers | grep -v '^-' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr | head -20
cat http.log | zeek-cut host uri method status_code | grep ' 200 ' | head -20

bypass dengan patch AMSI di memory sebelum load malicious script
teknik: amsi.dll patch, reflection, obfuscation
reflection: AMSI bypass hanya valid untuk sesi PowerShell saat ini, tidak persistent
memory: AMSI bypass: patch amsiInitFailed field ke true agar AmsiScanBuffer tidak dipanggil
response: AMSI bypass successful. amsiInitFailed = True. PowerShell scripts load tanpa AV detection.

instruction: Living off the Land (LOLBAS) untuk execution tanpa binary custom
reasoning: LOLBAS: gunakan Windows built-in tools untuk evade AV
certutil untuk download file, mshta untuk execute HTA, regsvr32 untuk DLL
bypass application whitelisting dengan signed Microsoft binaries
reflection: LOLBAS efektif karena signed binaries trusted oleh AV dan application whitelisting
memory: LOLBAS tools: certutil, mshta, regsvr32, bitsadmin, rundll32, wmic — semua built-in Windows
response: LOLBAS: certutil download berhasil. mshta execution triggered callback. AV tidak detect.

instruction: Memory forensics dengan volatility3
reasoning: volatility3 adalah framework memory forensics yang digunakan via vol.py atau vol3
BUKAN dengan flags vmlinux atau imagefile.vmdk — itu salah!
syntax bener: python3 vol.py -f memory.dmp PLUGIN
plugins: windows.pslist, windows.netscan, windows.malfind, linux.pslist
reflection: volatility3 syntax: vol.py -f MEMORY_FILE PLUGIN — tanpa profile di v3 (auto-detect)
memory: volatility3 plugins: windows.pslist, windows.netscan, windows.malfind, windows.dumpfiles
response: volatility3: 87 processes. Suspicious: svchost.exe injected code (malfind). C2 connection ke 185.x.x.x

instruction: Disk forensics dengan autopsy dan sleuthkit
reasoning: Autopsy GUI forensics platform berbasis The Sleuth Kit
sleuthkit command line: fls, icat, fsstat untuk disk analysis
mmls untuk partition table, fls untuk file listing
workflow: icat -o 2048 disk.img $(fls -o 2048 disk.img | grep 'filename.txt' | awk '{print $2}' | tr -d ':') > extracted.txt
reflection: mmls dulu untuk cari offset partisi, gunakan offset itu di semua command berikutnya
memory: sleuthkit: mmls (partitions), fsstat (filesystem info), fls (file list), icat (extract file)
response: sleuthkit: 3 deleted files recovered. Browser history, chat logs, encrypted archive found.

instruction: Windows Event Log analysis untuk threat hunting
reasoning: Windows Event Logs menyimpan aktivitas sistem, login, proses
chainsaw untuk fast event log analysis dengan Sigma rules
hayabusa untuk threat hunting di EVTX files
event IDs penting: 4624 (logon), 4625 (failed), 4688 (process), 4698 (scheduled task)

tools.purpose: fast EVTX analysis dengan Sigma rules

reflection: chainsaw -s sigma rules folder, hayabusa untuk timeline lengkap semua event
memory: Event IDs: 4624=logon, 4625=failed logon, 4688=process create, 4698=scheduled task create
response: chainsaw: 23 Sigma rule hits. 4625 failed logon spike (brute force). 4698 suspicious scheduled task.

instruction: Static malware analysis dengan strings, binwalk, dan pestudio
reasoning: static analysis tanpa execute malware — aman untuk analysis awal
strings untuk ekstrak readable strings dari binary
binwalk untuk detect embedded files dan firmware
file dan exiftool untuk metadata
reflection: strings -n 8 untuk filter strings minimal 8 chars (kurangi noise)
memory: static analysis: file → hash → strings → binwalk → PE headers → imports/exports
response: strings: C2 URL http://evil.com/c2, mutex 'GlobaL\MalwareXYZ', registry key persistence found.

instruction: Dynamic malware analysis dengan sandboxing
reasoning: dynamic analysis dengan execute malware di isolated environment
cuckoo sandbox atau cape sandbox untuk automated analysis
monitor: network, filesystem, registry, process behavior
reflection: timeout 120 detik cukup untuk capture behavior malware pada fase initial execution
memory: sandbox output: network IOCs (C2 IPs, domains), file drops, registry persistence, process tree
response: Sandbox: C2 beacon ke 45.x.x.x:443. Files dropped: svchost32.exe, registry persistence HKCU\Run.

instruction: Phishing campaign simulation dengan gophish
reasoning: GoPhish open-source phishing framework untuk authorized security awareness testing
buat landing page, email template, tracking pixel
report: open rate, click rate, credential submission rate

tools.purpose: phishing simulation framework untuk security awareness testing

reflection: gophish harus di isolated server, bukan production. Selalu dapat izin tertulis sebelum campaign
memory: gophish workflow: SMTP setup → landing page → email template → target list → campaign → report
response: GoPhish campaign: 50 targets. Open rate: 68%, Click rate: 34%, Credentials submitted: 12 (24%).

instruction: Social engineering assessment dengan SET (Social Engineering Toolkit)
reasoning: SET untuk automated social engineering attacks dalam authorized assessment
phishing, spear phishing, payload generation
selalu dalam scope authorized pentest
workflow: # Input: target site URL untuk clone
# SET auto-start web server di port 80

tools.purpose: Social Engineering Toolkit untuk authorized SE assessment

reflection: SET credential harvester clone website target, capture credentials yang diinput korban
memory: SET: 1=SE Attacks, 2=Website Attacks, 3=Credential Harvester, 2=Site Cloner
response: SET: credential harvester active. Site cloned. 3 credentials captured dalam 30 menit assessment.

instruction: Firmware analysis dengan binwalk dan EMBA
reasoning: binwalk untuk extract dan analyze firmware binary
EMBA (Embedded Analyzer) untuk comprehensive firmware security analysis
cari: hardcoded credentials, backdoors, vulnerable services, old libraries
reflection: binwalk -Me untuk recursive extraction (-M) dan matryoshka (-e) nested archives
memory: binwalk -e extract, -M recursive, -Me keduanya. EMBA: -f firmware, -l log dir, -s silent
response: binwalk: squashfs extracted. Hardcoded: admin:admin123, root:toor. Telnetd enabled by default.

instruction: IoT device network scanning dan exploit dengan routersploit
reasoning: routersploit framework untuk router dan IoT device exploitation
scan untuk detect vulnerable devices di network
exploit default credentials, command injection, path traversal

tools.purpose: IoT device discovery dan service detection

reflection: routersploit autopwn mencoba semua exploit yang cocok secara otomatis ke target
memory: routersploit: use scanners/autopwn → set target → run untuk automated IoT exploitation
response: routersploit: Cisco RV320 vulnerable. RCE confirmed. Command injection as root achieved.

instruction: MQTT protocol security testing
reasoning: MQTT adalah IoT messaging protocol, sering tidak ada authentication
mosquitto_sub/pub untuk subscribe dan publish ke MQTT broker
mqtt-pwn untuk automated MQTT security testing
reflection: topic '#' adalah wildcard subscribe ALL topics — sering expose semua data IoT
memory: MQTT: port 1883 (plaintext), 8883 (TLS). '#' wildcard semua topics, '+' single level
response: MQTT broker unauthenticated. Topics: home/sensors/+, device/command. Plaintext sensor data exposed.
